snapshot.nutrition: Solid — 2 eggs + 2 whites + yogurt w/ ketchup sriracha + tomatoes (noon), green apple 5pm, japchae w/ beef + yogurt + bf's bulgogi 8pm. Protein every meal, no binge. Possibly under-eating (est 1000-1200 cal).
snapshot.notes: Poor sleep — fragmented, kept waking to pee. Drank too much liquid before bed.

readiness.reasoning: HRV +3.8 SD (HIGH), RHR -1 (HIGH), but sleep fragmented (MODERATE) and fatigue 2. Lowest signal wins.

actual_exercises.name: Treadmill Run
actual_exercises.notes: 20 min at comfortable pace, no target, no progression

flags: HRR 11 bpm at run stop — below 12 bpm threshold (Cole 1999). Poor parasympathetic recovery.
Avg HR ~176, peak 190 on a recovery-pace run — elevated HR response. Likely fragmented sleep + cumulative fatigue.
Team dinner — skipped evening session with bf.
notes: Active recovery day. Run only, no strength or core. Team dinner cancelled evening session with bf.
